calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Helen Sorep Matley.
Atty. David P. Wasserman Esq., appearing for the Plaintiff Kevin M. Huynh.
Plaintiff Kevin M. Huynh was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants Apex Property Investments Inc., Betty Tran, Thy Luu aka Thy Nancy Luu, One Stop Services and National Recreational Land Liquidators East, LLc. as follows:
Principal $ 10,000
Attorney Fee - $5,715
Costs $495.50 for a total of $16,210.50
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
